info.description:
Registry-first API for immutable skill publication, candidate discovery,
exact dependency reads, immutable metadata batch fetch, immutable content batch
fetch, and governed lifecycle updates.

The server owns data-local registry operations only. Prompt interpretation,
reranking, dependency solving, final selection, lock generation, and execution
planning remain client-owned behavior outside this API boundary.
info.title: aptitude-server Service

post.description: Return ordered candidate slugs from indexed metadata and description search. This route is discovery-only: it does not resolve dependencies, choose a final candidate, or perform solver behavior.
Return immutable markdown content as `multipart/mixed` in request order. Each part includes coordinate and status headers.

200.description: Ordered immutable markdown parts returned successfully.

post.summary: Fetch immutable markdown content in batch

post.description: Return immutable metadata envelopes for an ordered list of exact coordinates. Missing coordinates are returned as `not_found` items.

200.description: Ordered immutable metadata results returned successfully.

get.description: Return process liveness for lightweight probes.
Return dependency readiness, including a database connectivity check.
Return authored direct `depends_on` declarations for one exact immutable version. This route does not recurse, solve version constraints, or return non-dependency relationship families.

parameters.description: Stable public slug of the skill to resolve.
parameters.name: slug

schema.description: Stable public slug of the skill to resolve.
schema.title: Slug

parameters.description: Exact immutable semantic version to resolve.
parameters.name: version

schema.description: Exact immutable semantic version to resolve.
schema.title: Version

404.description: The requested immutable `slug@version` does not exist.

post.description: Create a new immutable skill version from a normalized JSON payload containing markdown content, structured metadata, and authored relationships.

content.raw_markdown:
# Python Lint

Lint Python files consistently.

422.description: The request body, path parameters, or query parameters are invalid.

error.message: Failed to persist immutable skill version.

500.description: Normalized content or metadata persistence failed.

patch.description: Transition the lifecycle state for one immutable skill version.

422.description: The request body, path parameters, or query parameters are invalid.
